SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NYIMA DORJE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY MARK LOBRE, LEAD COUNSEL FOR ALLSTATE INSURANCE. COURT QUESTIONS IF MR. LOBRE HAS THE AUTHORITY TO APPEAR ON ALLSTATES' BEHALF SINCE HE IS AN ATTORNEY. MR. LOBRE STATES THAT HE IS NOT APPEARING IN THE CAPACITY OF AN ATTORNEY BUT AS AN EMPLOYEE OF ALLSTATE. COURT ALLOWS MR. LOBRE TO APPEAR ON ALLSTATES'S BEHALF PER CCP 116.530. TRIAL IS HELD. COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER RECESS UNTIL THE 1:30 P.M. CALENDAR ON MARCH 4, 2020 TO ALLOW ALLSTATE TO OBTAIN ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE, SPECIFICALLY PLAINTIFF'S POLICY RE: FULL COLLISION COVERAGE. MATTER IS RE-CALLED AT 2:15 P.M. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Allstate Insurance Company, Atty. David R. Simonton appearing on behalf of the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Nyima Dorje the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Allstate Insurance Company, Atty. David R. Simonton testifies on his behalf.

Respondent, Plaintiff Nyima Dorje on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)
